title: Who truly is best girl
wikitext:
[]: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Sun May 03, 2009 11:31 am I'm new to this site so I felt like starting up a topic, I hope that's ok.... Who do you like better as a character in general? Rei or Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Evayo » Sun May 03, 2009 11:42 am Welcome! But... there was already a topic on this not too long ago, and it got locked because people were straying off-topic. And I love them both. ~:Evayo:~

[]: Re: Rei or Asuka?             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 03, 2009 11:45 am offthechainjoe wrote: I'm new to this site so I felt like starting up a topic, I hope that's ok.... Who do you like better as a character in general? Rei or Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Sun May 03, 2009 11:52 am my bad guys, sorry, i'll try to think clearer in the future

[]: Are you a Rei Person or a Asuka Person?             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:29 pm While it's obvious you can like both characters the same, I say it's one or the other. Kinda like in that deleted scene in Pulp Fiction where Mia Wallace tells Vincent Vega there's two type of people in the world: Beatles people and Elvis people. For me personally, I would be a Rei person (Always have been.)

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:34 pm Rei. She's not mean like Asuka and in Japanese is voiced by my favorite female seiyu.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:36 pm Since you're new, you'll want to read the rules section. We encourage you to use the search function or thread list before creating new threads. We've had several Asuka v. Rei threads.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:37 pm I've always favored Rei over Asuka. I was never sure why.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:41 pm Not sure why this wasn't locked before. These threads always end up closed so let's not start this again.

[]: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by cunning linguist » Fri Aug 12, 2016 7:16 pm Alright boys, let's plot a course - intercourse. I have heard differing scholarly opinions on this, and would like to resolve the question once and for all. So who, evageeks, is objectively best girl? Teh Rei, Asuka, Misato, Hikari, Ritsuko, or someone else entirely? Personally, I choose Ritsuko, cause she fine as hell, and I could sniff her eyebrows for days. She's also not a flat-chested teenager, and probably able to construct a nice hydroponics operation in my crawlspace with her scientific expertise. I have reached this conclusion through years of research with Trump University, where I hope to PhD in Waifu Studies. But my opinion is an unpopular one. Tell me, anime experts, who is your pick? Present your methodology, and cite your sources. Discuss, and mass debate amongst yourselves, and I will collect your conclusions for my thesis.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Aug 13, 2016 1:08 am I thought the consensus was that Shinji was Best Girl.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by CommanderFish » Sat Aug 13, 2016 1:20 am Pen Pen.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Aug 13, 2016 7:46 am Maya is best girl. She stays a respectable two steps behind her senpai at all times and has the cutest pink pillow with a white kitty on it.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Aug 13, 2016 3:39 pm Smart, cute, loyal, principled, optimistic, compassionate... Maya has it all. Well, as long as you're a lesbian and don't anticipate being in any firefights.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by NONAME » Sat Aug 13, 2016 4:12 pm I'm also a fan of Ritsuko: intelligent, cold-hearted, leadership qualities, she always know what to say and is not the anime cliche of a submissive woman. Asuka is fine too.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Aug 13, 2016 4:58 pm cunning linguist wrote: Personally, I choose Ritsuko, cause...I could sniff her eyebrows for days.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by cunning linguist » Sat Aug 13, 2016 9:24 pm Good responses so far, gents. Mr. Tines wrote: I thought the consensus was that Shinji was Best Girl.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by dontaskme » Sat Aug 13, 2016 10:11 pm armisael obviously

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by zeaven » Sun Aug 14, 2016 9:34 pm Hideaki Anno.

[]: Re: Who, truly, is best girl?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Aug 15, 2016 4:34 pm Lilith is the source of all potential best girls, therefore Lilith is true best girl.
